## Phase And Scope

- Phase:
- Why this change belongs in the current phase:

## Summary

Describe the change and the user or contributor outcome.

## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm test:integration`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Documentation

- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] ADR updated or added when the design changed
- [ ] Example or contributor guidance updated when repository workflow changed

## Release Notes

- [ ] Changeset added when release notes should mention this change
- [ ] Or this change is intentionally release-note silent and the reason is explained

## Boundaries

- [ ] No later-phase scope was pulled into this PR
- [ ] No new product behavior was introduced unless the active phase explicitly required it
